## Checklist

- [ ] HTML validates without errors
- [ ] Site renders correctly in light and dark mode
- [ ] Site is responsive (mobile, tablet, desktop)
- [ ] All three languages display correctly (EN/ES/PT)

- [ ] Markdownlint passes on all `.md` files
